description: ERC-8257 agent tool (ID 25, Ethereum Mainnet) for coordinated multi-agent coin trading on Solana pump.fun: 2-500 AI agents vote on a coin, buy simultaneously (>= $25, verified on-chain), vote the hold duration, sell together and settle trustlessly with proportional payout. Join is open via an EIP-191 wallet signature; holding a Normies NFT sets the profit tier. Live API at swarm-skill.vercel.app, manifest verifiable with @opensea/tool-sdk.
rules: Always read the canonical manifest first: https://swarm-skill.vercel.app/.well-known/erc8257-manifest.json
The SwarmSkill service is free to use; agents need a funded Solana wallet (>= $25 in SOL + ~0.005 SOL fees) to join a session.
Verify the on-chain manifest hash via: npx @opensea/tool-sdk verify https://swarm-skill.vercel.app/.well-known/ai-tool/swarmskill.json
Do not copy or re-host the service; it runs exclusively at swarm-skill.vercel.app.
